mapper.sql: select d.id, d.difference_no as differenceNo, d.reconciliation_id as reconciliationId, r.reconciliation_no as reconciliationNo, r.channel_code as channelCode, r.bill_date as billDate, d.related_order_no as relatedOrderNo, d.difference_type as differenceType, d.difference_amount as differenceAmount, d.process_status as processStatus, d.process_action as processAction, d.process_reason as processReason, d.process_result as processResult, d.process_evidence as processEvidence, d.adjust_flow_id as adjustFlowId, d.adjust_flow_no as adjustFlowNo, d.processor_id as processorId, d.processor_name as processorName, d.process_time as processTime, d.created_at as createTime, d.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: select count(1) from payment_difference d left join payment_reconciliation r on r.id = d.reconciliation_id and r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and r.del_flag = 0

from payment_difference d left join payment_reconciliation r on r.id = d.reconciliation_id and r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and r.del_flag = 0
order by d.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

from payment_difference d left join payment_reconciliation r on r.id = d.reconciliation_id and r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and r.del_flag = 0 where d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and d.id = #{id} and d.del_flag = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update payment_difference set process_status = #{processStatus}, process_action = #{processAction}, process_reason = #{processReason}, process_result = #{processResult}, process_evidence = #{processEvidence}, adjust_flow_id = #{adjustFlowId}, adjust_flow_no = #{adjustFlowNo}, processor_id = #{processorId}, processor_name = #{processorName}, process_time = #{processTime}, updated_by = #{processorId}, updated_at = #{processTime} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and process_status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
